title: chrysiphiala aurantiaca
intro: Chrysiphiala aurantiaca, also known as the orange-flowered chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Chrysiphiala aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
